top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN male_count > female_count THEN 'True' 
        ELSE 'False' 
    END AS result
FROM (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND l.CRE IS NOT NULL AND (l.CRE < 0.6 OR l.CRE > 1.2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.CRE IS NOT NULL AND (l.CRE < 0.6 OR l.CRE > 1.0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS female_count
    FROM Patient p
    JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
) subquery;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND l.CRE NOT BETWEEN 0.6 AND 1.2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 
         SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.CRE NOT BETWEEN 0.6 AND 1.2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
    THEN 'True' 
    ELSE 'False' 
  END AS result
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN male_count > female_count THEN 'True' 
        ELSE 'False' 
    END AS result
FROM (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND l.CRE IS NOT NULL AND (l.CRE < 0.6 OR l.CRE > 1.2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.CRE IS NOT NULL AND (l.CRE < 0.6 OR l.CRE > 1.0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS female_count
    FROM Patient p
    JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
) subquery;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN male_count > female_count THEN 'True' 
        ELSE 'False' 
    END AS result
FROM (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND l.CRE IS NOT NULL AND CAST(l.CRE AS REAL) NOT BETWEEN 0.6 AND 1.2 THEN p.ID END) AS male_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.CRE IS NOT NULL AND CAST(l.CRE AS REAL) NOT BETWEEN 0.6 AND 1.0 THEN p.ID END) AS female_count
    FROM Patient p
    INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
) counts;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Patient p JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID WHERE p.SEX = 'M' AND l.CRE NOT BETWEEN 0.6 AND 1.2) > 
         (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Patient p JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID WHERE p.SEX = 'F' AND l.CRE NOT BETWEEN 0.6 AND 1.2) 
    THEN 'True' 
    ELSE 'False' 
  END AS result;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN male_count > female_count THEN 'True' 
        ELSE 'False' 
    END AS result
FROM (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND l.CRE IS NOT NULL AND (l.CRE < 0.6 OR l.CRE > 1.2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.CRE IS NOT NULL AND (l.CRE < 0.6 OR l.CRE > 1.0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS female_count
    FROM Patient p
    JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
) subquery;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN male_count > female_count THEN 'True' 
        ELSE 'False' 
    END AS result
FROM (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND l.CRE IS NOT NULL AND CAST(l.CRE AS REAL) NOT BETWEEN 0.6 AND 1.2 THEN p.ID END) AS male_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.CRE IS NOT NULL AND CAST(l.CRE AS REAL) NOT BETWEEN 0.6 AND 1.0 THEN p.ID END) AS female_count
    FROM Patient p
    INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
) counts;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN male_count > female_count THEN 'True' 
        ELSE 'False' 
    END AS result
FROM (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND l.CRE IS NOT NULL AND (l.CRE < 0.6 OR l.CRE > 1.2) THEN 1 END) AS male_count,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.CRE IS NOT NULL AND (l.CRE < 0.6 OR l.CRE > 1.0) THEN 1 END) AS female_count
    FROM Patient p
    INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
) counts;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN male_count > female_count THEN 'True' 
        ELSE 'False' 
    END AS result
FROM (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND l.CRE IS NOT NULL AND (l.CRE < 0.6 OR l.CRE > 1.2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.CRE IS NOT NULL AND (l.CRE < 0.6 OR l.CRE > 1.0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS female_count
    FROM Patient p
    JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
) subquery;
